  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a port of Unix::Lsof, a perl wrapper around the UNIX lsof
  command.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Unix-Lsof/
  
  PR:             ports/131686
  Submitted by:   George Cox <gjvc at gjvc.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
